Video.summary: The drivers head to Texas to compete for tonight's trophy.
Video.title: NRG Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.summary: Let's get wild with the Monster Jam trucks as they race through the muddy Citrus Bowl in Orlando, FL.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Racing

Video.summary: Check out all the Monster Jam freestyle action from the Alamodome on January 16, 2010.
Video.title: Alamodome - San Antonio, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series West returns to Texas as Ryan Anderson looks to continue his reign as the winningest driver at AT&T Stadium. Camden Murphy attempts to get back to his winning ways and lead Bakugan Dragonoid to a long overdue win. While Charlie Pauken returns to Grave Digger for the first time in four years.
Video.title: AT&T Stadium - Arlington, TX

Video.summary: Round 3 of the 2018 Monster Jam season continues at Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, Florida.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2005 season continues in Orlando, Florida with epic racing action from the Florida Citrus Bowl, on January 29, 2005.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Racing

Video.summary: Will Max D continue to hold the lead for Monster Jam's West Championship Series?
Video.title: University of Phoenix Stadium - Glendale, AZ

University of Phoenix Stadium - Glendale, AZ
University of Phoenix Stadium - Glendale, AZ

Video.summary: 14 of the biggest names in Monster Jam racing compete for the invite to the World Championships.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: They say everything's bigger in Texas and all the big stars and the monster jam are on hand tonight! Monster Jam racing action kicks off at the Astrodome.
Video.title: Astrodome - Houston, TX - Racing

Video.summary: Don't miss all the freestyle action from Ford Field on January 17, 2009.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2013 season continues with freestyle action from Lincoln Financial Field, on June 9, 2012.
Video.title: Lincoln Financial Field - Philadelphia, PA - Freestyle

Lincoln Financial Field - Philadelphia, PA - Freestyle

Video.summary: Hang on tight! Epic freestyle action takes center stage at the Florida Citrus Bowl, on January 30, 2010.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2022 season continues with round 24 of the Stadium Championship Series, at Rice-Eccles Stadium, Salt Lake City, UT
Video.title: Rice-Eccles Stadium - Salt Lake City, UT

Video.title: Chase Field - Phoenix, AZ - Racing

Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Racing

Video.summary: Get ready to jam with Monster Jam's freestyle action at the HHH Metrodome, on December 10, 2011.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Check out all the racing and freestyle Monster Jam action from the Saturday night show at Bridgestone Arena on January 6, 2018.
Video.title: Bridgestone Arena - Nashville, TN - Triple Threat

Video.summary: Check out the racing freestyle action from Angel Stadium on January 10, 2014.

Video.summary: The competition is getting fierce as we near the end of the 2018 Monster Jam season.
Video.title: Gillette Stadium - Foxborough, MA

Video.summary: Don't miss the thrilling Monster Jam racing action from Gillette Stadium on June 20, 2015!
Video.title: Gillette Stadium - Foxborough, MA - Racing

Video.summary: The fun continues with the freestyle action biggest event with 22 Monster Trucks from Reliant Stadium on January 3, 2014.
Video.title: Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2022 season at Royal Farms Arena in Baltimore, MD featuring racing, 2-wheel, donuts, and freestyle competitions.
Video.title: Royal Farms Arena - Baltimore, MD

Video.summary: Watch the Monster Jam action at Dunkin Donuts Center in Providence, RI featuring racing, 2-wheel, donuts, and freestyle competitions.
Video.title: Dunkin Donuts Center - Providence, RI

Video.summary: During Monster Jam's World Finals II, trucks and drivers compete in freestyle events.
Video.title: World Finals II - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle

Image.alt: World Finals II - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle
World Finals II - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle
World Finals II - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle

Video.summary: Check out awesome monster truck action at Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, FL during Monster Jam's 2013 season!
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: Monster Jam storms into the Fiserv Forum in Milwaukee for an adrenaline-fueled stop on the Freestyle Media Championship Series. The night features a high-stakes lineup of JCB Racing, the technical Two Wheel Skills Challenge, and the fan-favorite Freestyle competition where drivers have 75 seconds to push their machines to the limit. Rivalries ignite as four-time champion Weston Anderson and 2025 Entertainer of the Year Fernando Martinez battle for dominance, while local heroes like Brandon and Mikayla Tulachka look to claim victory in front of their hometown crowd. From precision nose wheelies to gravity-defying backflips, this episode captures every heart-pounding moment as eight elite teams compete for the overall event title.
Video.title: Fiserv Forum, Milwaukee, WI

Video.summary: Philadelphia is host to Monster Jam Primetime for racing, skills, and freestyle action with all your favorite trucks and drivers.
Video.title: Lincoln Financial Field - Philadelphia, PA

Video.summary: Monster Jam returns to Angel Stadium in Anaheim for a high-octane round of Stadium Championship Series West. Rivalries ignite as top-ranked racers like Tyler Menninga in Grave Digger and Cole Venard in Black Pearl battle for dominance in intense, tire-to-tire photo finishes. Experience the roar of the crowd and the relentless energy of a phenomenon that is trending across the world.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: The 2024 Arena Championship Series West debuts at the Delta Center in Salt Lake City, Utah. Grave Digger’s Brandon Vinson begins his quest for a record 5th series championship as he contends with 2023 Co-Rookie of the Year, Ashley Sanford kicking off the 2024 Monster Jam Season.
Video.title: Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT

Image.alt: Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT
Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT
Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT
